description: Style Note Topping every teen's wardrobe wish-list is this striking pair of shoes. Girly and stylish, this pair of shoes goes very well with western and ethnic outfits. Wear it with jeans, shorts or kurtis for a cute look that is oh so charming! Product Details Blunt toed ballerina leather shoes in red with a bow and beaded detail in the forefoot region Soft footbed for all day comfort Upper adhered to the outsole Textured rubber outsole Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth when needed
